title: Charlotte Business Owner Recounts Tornado Impact
summary: A Charlotte business owner describes the moment a tornado hit his warehouse, expressing relief that no one was injured.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the immediate impact of severe weather on local businesses and the importance of safety measures.

title: EF0 Tornado Confirmed in Charlotte Warehouse District
summary: The National Weather Service confirms an EF0 tornado struck a warehouse in northeast Charlotte during Monday's storms.
charlotte_impact: Official confirmation provides clarity on the severity of the weather event and aids in damage assessment.

title: Man Charged with Arson at Iredell County Truck Stop
summary: A Taylorsville man is charged with setting a fire inside an Iredell County truck stop; video evidence reportedly captured the suspect leaving the scene.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates a case of arson and the role of surveillance in identifying suspects.

title: False Active Shooter Call Triggers Lockdown at Cleveland County High School
summary: Crest High School was placed on lockdown following a false active shooter call; no actual threats were found, and the campus has been cleared.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of false alarms on school safety and the resources required for response.

title: Tree Falls on Property: Who Is Responsible?
summary: Explains liability for property damage caused by fallen trees during severe thunderstorms in the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Provides important information for homeowners regarding property damage and insurance claims.

title: Severe Storms Forecast for Charlotte Area
summary: Multiple rounds of strong-to-severe storms are expected in the Charlotte area, posing a risk of damaging winds, isolated tornadoes, and large hail.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to potential hazards and encourages preparedness for severe weather conditions.

title: Man Charged with Attempted Murder After Shooting Roommate
summary: A 60-year-old man is charged with attempted first-degree murder after allegedly shooting his roommate, who sustained serious injuries.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a serious violent crime incident within the community.

title: Thousands Without Power in North Carolina Due to Storms
summary: Severe storms have left over 7,500 Duke Energy customers in North Carolina without power, with repairs and damage assessments underway.
charlotte_impact: Details the widespread impact of severe weather on infrastructure and residents.

title: CSX Trains Collide, Derail in Hamlet; No Injuries
summary: Two CSX trains collided in Hamlet, causing 18 cars to derail; no injuries or environmental threats were reported, and cleanup is in progress.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a significant transportation incident with potential economic and environmental consequences.

title: One Dead, Two Injured in Hickory Shooting; Suspect Arrested
summary: A Hickory man is charged with murder and attempted murder following a Friday night shooting that resulted in one fatality and two injuries.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a tragic incident of gun violence and its impact on the community.

title: Fatal House Fire in Chesterfield County Under Investigation
summary: A house fire in Chesterfield County resulted in one fatality, prompting an arson investigation by state authorities; the cause of the fire is unknown.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a deadly fire and the subsequent investigation to determine the cause.

title: Woman Charged with Kidnapping Child in Lincoln County
summary: A woman is charged with kidnapping after allegedly leaving Denver with her two children and another child who was not hers.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a serious crime involving the abduction of a minor.

title: Sycamore Brewing Reopening with New Name, Owner
summary: Sycamore Brewing is reopening this weekend under a new name and with a new owner taking over operations.
charlotte_impact: Announces a positive development for the local business community.

title: Stabbing in East Charlotte
summary: A victim was stabbed in east Charlotte and transported to the hospital with serious injuries.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a violent crime incident requiring medical intervention.

title: Missing Anson County Teen Found Safe
summary: A 19-year-old missing from Anson County has been found safe after last being seen on March 10.
charlotte_impact: Provides a positive update on a missing person case, bringing relief to the community.
